title: hieracium neopicris subsp. stenopicris
intro: Hieracium neopicris subsp. stenopicris, a lesser-known species within the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant, also known as Hawkweed, is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium neopicris subsp. stenopicris include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues, as well as its potential to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. In terms of herbal preparations, Hieracium neopicris subsp. stenopicris can be used as a tincture, tea, or salve, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
